params.name: Treasure Island
params.description:
On Jun 27, 1883 AD, Stevenson officially released the book Treasure Island.
Treasure Island is an adventure novel by British novelist Stevenson that follows the story of a boy named Jim as he embarks on a journey to find a legendary treasure. Along the way, he battles ruthless pirates and quells a rebellion. Rumors abound that six treasures still remain buried on the island, drawing treasure hunters from far and wide.
